/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/client.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/client.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/client.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-g++  -m32 -shared -Wl,--allow-multiple-definition -Wl,--unresolved-symbols=ignore-in-shared-libs -o client.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libclient.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/client.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/client.dir/linkLibs.rsp
